title: Peruvian Cheese Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Peruvian-inspired stew made with tender cheese and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Peruvian cheese
ingredients.notes: such as Queso fresco or similar

ingredients.name: Tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

ingredients.name: Dense sweet potatoes
ingredients.notes: such as Yukon gold or similar

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add sweet potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in Tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add Peruvian cheese and water, bring to a simmer.
7. Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until cheese is melted and sweet potatoes are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
